display_text: Doom Aghanim's Scepter: Doom now affects all allies in a 350 radius around the target or Doom himself when self-cast. This upgrade enhances Doom's teamfight control and anti-support capabilities by silencing and disabling multiple enemies simultaneously, countering grouped-up strategies and protecting key allies.
search_text: Doom Aghanim Scepter anti-support silence disable teamfight control group-up strategy

display_text: Doom Aghanim's Shard: Scorched Earth now heals Doom and his controlled units for 60% of the damage dealt. This upgrade significantly improves Doom's sustain and anti-push potential, allowing him to maintain pressure and survive prolonged engagements.
search_text: Doom Aghanim Shard sustain heal anti-push prolonged engagement survival
